overview: VIT-AP Student Hub is a bold, cinematic student guide for freshers and prospective students at VIT-AP University. Styled like a premium editorial magazine — dark backgrounds, bold serif typography, crimson and gold accents — it presents honest, personal advice about academics, hostel life, food, events, and studying abroad. Written in a senior-to-junior voice, it helps students decide whether VIT-AP is right for them.
features: Cinematic dark editorial design inspired by donmolinico.es
Full-screen hero section with bold display typography
Chapter-like sections for each topic area
Minimal sticky navigation with dark theme
Complete VIT-AP student guide: academics, hostel, food, essentials, events, studying abroad
Bold accordion FAQs for prospective students
Pros & Cons section in split editorial layout
Sample mess menu and hostel pricing
